action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, Spreitzer, Hesselbein, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Drake, Dassler-Alfheim, Roys, Habush Sinykin, Larson, Keyeski and L. Johnson; 
cosponsored by Representatives Brown, J. Jacobson, Sinicki, Miresse, Fitzgerald, Udell, Roe, Hysell, Joers, Bare, Emerson, Tenorio, McCarville, Arney, Neubauer, DeSmidt, DeSanto, Anderson, Hong, Goodwin, Johnson, Clancy, Billings, Phelps, Stubbs, Subeck, Sheehan and Stroud
